history.content:
<thought>
A célula imediatamente à frente de mim é lava, então não posso seguir em frente com segurança. A célula livre à minha direita parece ser o melhor próximo passo para contornar o perigo e me aproximar do objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible up and to the left relative to me. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot go forward. I should turn counter-clockwise to face toward the open path leading closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest immediate move is to rotate so I can head toward the open floor cell to my right and continue toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible one cell to my left and three cells ahead relative to the current view, but the cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To make progress toward the goal, I should rotate counter-clockwise so I can face the open path on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must not go forward. The safest visible option is to rotate so I can head toward the free floor cells on my right side, which also brings me closer to the goal O.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
O objetivo O está visível e há um caminho seguro de piso entre mim e ele. À minha frente há uma parede #, então não posso avançar. A célula livre mais útil agora está à esquerda; vou girar anti-horário para me orientar em direção a ela.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safest visible move is to rotate so I can head toward the open floor cell on my right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible to my left, but the direct path upward is blocked by a wall and there is lava nearby. The cell in front of me appears to be a wall, so I should rotate to find a safe direction toward the open floor cells.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward safely. The left cell is open, so I will rotate counter-clockwise to face that direction and explore.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible up-left from my current position. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to reorient toward the open path on my left side, where there is a safe floor cell leading toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safe adjacent option is to turn right/clockwise so I can face the open path on my right side.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible in the local view, but the cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot advance. I need to reorient toward the open path that leads around the lava. Turning clockwise should be the best next step to find a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
There is no goal visible yet. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The left side appears open, so I will rotate counter-clockwise to face a potentially free path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is visible to my left, but I am currently facing upward and the cell in front of me is a wall. The safe open cell is to my left after turning counter-clockwise, so I will rotate to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou orientado para cima, e a célula à frente é lava, então não posso avançar com segurança. A célula livre à minha direita está acessível, então vou girar no sentido horário para me alinhar com ela.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
